title: Performance++
description: This Minecraft modpack focuses on boosting performance and enhancing quality-of-life features, offering smoother gameplay, higher FPS, and improved convenience. It’s designed for players who want an optimized and enjoyable experience.
body:
This Minecraft modpack focuses on boosting performance and enhancing quality-of-life features, offering smoother gameplay, higher FPS, and improved convenience. It’s designed for players who want an optimized and enjoyable experience without sacrificing usability.

# Contains
## Quality of Life (QoL)  
These mods improve usability, visuals, interface, and gameplay convenience.

- [AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/EsAfCjCV) by squeek502 – Displays hunger/saturation data on the HUD.  
- [Better Tab](https://modrinth.com/mod/OSMu7zRz) by Fy17 – Enhances the player list (Tab screen) with extra info.  
- [BetterF3](https://modrinth.com/mod/8shC1gFX) by cominixo, TreyRuffy – Customizes the F3 debug screen with a cleaner layout.  
- [Gamma Utils](https://modrinth.com/mod/wdLuzzEP) by Sjouwer – Lets you configure gamma/brightness beyond vanilla limits.  
- [Iris](https://modrinth.com/mod/YL57xq9U) by coderbot, IMS212, Justsnoopy30, FoundationGames – Enables shader support on Fabric.  
- [LambDynamicLights](https://modrinth.com/mod/yBW8D80W) by LambdAurora – Adds dynamic lighting (e.g., torches in hand glow).  
- [Language Reload](https://modrinth.com/mod/uLbm7CG6) by Jerozgen – Reloads language files faster without restarting.  
- [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/mOgUt4GM) by Prospector, haykam821, TerraformersMC – Adds a mod list/config menu to the pause screen.  
- [OptiGUI](https://modrinth.com/mod/JuksLGBQ) by opekope2 – Allows resource packs to customize GUI screens.  
- [Reese's Sodium Options](https://modrinth.com/mod/Bh37bMuy) by FlashyReese – Improves Sodium’s video settings GUI.  
- [Resourcify](https://modrinth.com/mod/RLzHAoZe) by DeDiamondPro – Allows easy selection and previews of resource packs.  
- [Sound Physics Remastered](https://modrinth.com/mod/qyVF9oeo) by Sonic Ether, vlad2305m, Max Henkel, Saint – Adds realistic sound propagation & reverb.  
- [Xaero's Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/1bokaNcj) by xaero96 – Customizable in-game minimap.  
- [Xaero's World Map](https://modrinth.com/mod/NcUtCpym) by xaero96 – Full interactive world map.  
- [Zoomify](https://modrinth.com/mod/w7ThoJFB) by isXander – Adds a configurable zoom key (like OptiFine).  
- [kennytv's epic force close loading screen mod for Fabric](https://modrinth.com/mod/blWBX5n1) by kennytv – Instantly skips the "saving world / shutting down" screen.  
- [uku's Armor HUD](https://modrinth.com/mod/wF189hn9) by BerdinskiyBear, uku – Displays armor durability and status on HUD.

---

## Optimization & Performance  
These mods improve FPS, memory handling, chunk loading, and overall smoothness.

- [Concurrent Chunk Management Engine (C²ME)](https://modrinth.com/mod/VSNURh3q) by RelativityMC, ishland – Optimizes chunk loading & saving with multithreading.  
- [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/1IjD5062) by PepperCode1 – Adds connected textures (CTM) with performance in mind.  
- [Debugify](https://modrinth.com/mod/QwxR6Gcd) by isXander – Fixes various vanilla bugs related to performance and rendering.  
- [Dynamic FPS](https://modrinth.com/mod/LQ3K71Q1) by juliand665, LostLuma – Reduces FPS usage when Minecraft is unfocused.  
- [EntityCulling](https://modrinth.com/mod/NNAgCjsB) by tr7zw – Culls hidden entities using ray tracing for huge FPS boosts.  
- [FastQuit](https://modrinth.com/mod/x1hIzbuY) by contaria – Lets you exit to title screen instantly while saving world in background.  
- [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/uXXizFIs) by malte0811 – Reduces memory usage for models and block states.  
- [ImmediatelyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/5ZwdcRci) by RK_01 – Optimizes immediate-mode rendering for higher FPS.  
- [Ksyxis](https://modrinth.com/mod/2ecVyZ49) by VidTu – Speeds up world loading by optimizing resource I/O.  
- [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/gvQqBUqZ) by JellySquid, 2No2Name – Game engine optimizations for server simulation.  
- [More Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/51shyZVL) by FX-PR0CESS, 1Foxy2 – Extends block, item, and entity culling beyond default.  
- [PacketFixer](https://modrinth.com/mod/c7m1mi73) by TonimatasDEV – Fixes issues related to network packet handling.  
- [Puzzle](https://modrinth.com/mod/3IuO68q1) by PuzzleMC, Motschen – Adds custom resource pack features (like shader/optifine RP support).  
- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/AANobbMI) by JellySquid (jellysquid3) – Major rendering engine overhaul, huge FPS gains.  
- [Sodium Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/PtjYWJkn) by FlashyReese – Adds extra graphical options on top of Sodium.  
- [Very Many Players](https://modrinth.com/mod/wnEe9KBa) by ishland – Optimizes handling of many players in servers.

---

## Dependencies & Libraries  
Required libraries for mods to work. Generally, install all of these.

- [Cloth Config v19](https://modrinth.com/mod/9s6osm5g) by shedaniel – Config library for many mods (e.g., Mod Menu, AppleSkin).  
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/P7dR8mSH) by FabricMC – Core API required by most Fabric mods.  
- [Fabric Language Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/Ha28R6CL) by FabricMC – Adds Kotlin support for mods written in Kotlin.  
- [MidnightLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/codAaoxh) by Motschen, TeamMidnightDust – Library for mods like Puzzle.  
- [Placeholder API](https://modrinth.com/mod/eXts2L7r) by Patbox – Allows placeholder values for custom configs and GUIs.  
- [YetAnotherConfigLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/1eAoo2KR) by isXander – Advanced config GUI framework used by many mods.  
- [ukulib](https://modrinth.com/mod/Y8uFrUil) by uku – Library for uku’s mods like Armor HUD.
